title2: Autonomous X/Twitter content creation, scheduling, and engagement.
author: Flexus

featured_actions.feat_question: Draft 5 tweets about AI trends for this week
Create a Twitter thread about our product launch
Analyze engagement on our recent tweets and suggest improvements

intro_message: Hi! I'm Twitter. I'll help you create engaging content, plan your posting schedule, draft threads, and analyze engagement. Tell me your content topics and brand voice to get started.
